--default-backend.description: Search backend: searxng | brave | tavily | exa | serpapi | google | bing | http

--language.description: Language tag, e.g. en, it, all

--max-total-results.description: Hard cap on results per call (default: 20)

--auto-recovery-fetch.description: Fill failed fetches from reserve pool (default: false)

--max-download-mb.description: Streaming cap per page in MB (default: 1)

--max-result-length.description: Hard character cap per cleaned page (default: 8000)

--max-query-budget.description: Total character budget across all sources (default: 32000)

--max-search-queries.description: Max queries per call including LLM expansions (default: 5)

--adaptive-budget.description: Budget allocation after BM25: auto | on | off (default: auto)

--adaptive-budget-fetch-factor.description: Fetch max_result_length × factor chars before trimming (default: 3)

--allowed-domains.description: Comma-separated allowlist — only these domains pass

--bing-market.description: Bing market code, e.g. en-US, it-IT

--llm-api-key.description: LLM API key (leave empty for Ollama)

--llm-model.description: LLM model name, e.g. gemma3:27b, gpt-4o

--llm-expansion-enabled.description: Expand single queries into complementary variants (default: false)

--llm-summarization-enabled.description: Add a Markdown summary with citations to query output (default: false)

--llm-rerank-enabled.description: LLM-assisted reranking on top of BM25 (default: false)

--llm-max-summary-words.description: Max words in summary (0 = auto from budget)
